description: A dashboard to help with cost and utilisation

panels.title: Namespace cost and utilisation analysis over the period

targets.expr:
# CPU Requested (we consider price for cpu equal between bare metal and public cloud)
kube_namespace_labels{label_project=~"$project", label_product=~"$product", label_environment_kind=~"$kind", cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace) group_right(label_environment_kind, label_product, label_project, label_client) (
    avg_over_time(
        namespace_cpu:kube_pod_container_resource_requests:sum{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range:$__interval]
    )
    or sum by (cluster, namespace, prometheus, prometheus_replica) (kube_namespace_labels{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * 0)
)

- on (cluster, namespace, label_product, label_project, label_client, label_environment_kind)

kube_namespace_labels{label_project=~"$project", label_product=~"$product", label_environment_kind=~"$kind", cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace) group_right(label_environment_kind, label_product, label_project, label_client) (
    avg_over_time(
        namespace_cpu:kube_pod_container_resource_requests:sum{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range:$__interval] offset 30d
    )
    or sum by (cluster, namespace, prometheus, prometheus_replica) (kube_namespace_labels{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * 0)
)

# RAM Requested, public cloud
kube_namespace_labels{label_project=~"$project", label_product=~"$product", label_environment_kind=~"$kind", cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace) group_right(label_environment_kind, label_product, label_project, label_client) (
    avg_over_time(namespace_memory:kube_pod_container_resource_requests_not_bare_metal:sum{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range:$__interval]) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)
    or sum by (cluster, namespace, prometheus, prometheus_replica) (kube_namespace_labels{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * 0)
)

- on (cluster, namespace, label_product, label_project, label_client, label_environment_kind)

kube_namespace_labels{label_project=~"$project", label_product=~"$product", label_environment_kind=~"$kind", cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace) group_right(label_environment_kind, label_product, label_project, label_client) (
    avg_over_time(namespace_memory:kube_pod_container_resource_requests_not_bare_metal:sum{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range:$__interval] offset 30d) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)
    or sum by (cluster, namespace, prometheus, prometheus_replica) (kube_namespace_labels{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * 0)
)

# RAM Requested, bare metal
kube_namespace_labels{label_project=~"$project", label_product=~"$product", label_environment_kind=~"$kind", cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace) group_right(label_environment_kind, label_product, label_project, label_client) (
   avg_over_time(namespace_memory:kube_pod_container_resource_requests_bare_metal:sum{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range:$__interval]) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)
   or sum by (cluster, namespace, prometheus, prometheus_replica) (kube_namespace_labels{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * 0)
)

- on (cluster, namespace, label_product, label_project, label_client, label_environment_kind)

kube_namespace_labels{label_project=~"$project", label_product=~"$product", label_environment_kind=~"$kind", cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace) group_right(label_environment_kind, label_product, label_project, label_client) (
   avg_over_time(namespace_memory:kube_pod_container_resource_requests_bare_metal:sum{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range:$__interval] offset 30d) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)
   or sum by (cluster, namespace, prometheus, prometheus_replica) (kube_namespace_labels{cluster="$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"} * 0)
)

title: FinOps: Cost Analysis by Cluster
